texto: Probably I have more phobias, fear and eccentricities than I would care to admit. I don't think I'm in danger of losing my mind, but I do often question my own behavior. I have a very bad temper, and it's not always healthy for me and for others. I make my way in the world more difficult, and I could do with a little more yoga.
explicacao: Citação de Denis O'Hare sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Probably I have more phobias, fear and eccentricities than I would care to admit. I don't think I…” articula reflexao, world, mind em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mind e behavior.

frase_original: Probably I have more phobias, fear and eccentricities than I would care to admit. I don't think I'm in danger of losing my mind, but I do often question my own behavior. I have a very bad temper, and it's not always healthy for me and for others. I make my way in the world more difficult, and I could do with a little more yoga.

texto: I was a fan of 'Six Feet Under' and was very sad when it ended, so I was not ready to switch my allegiance to another show. So I was like, 'I'm not watching this 'True Blood.' Then a friend got a bootleg copy of the first four episodes, and by the third one, I was irrevocably hooked.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Denis O'Hare: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “I was a fan of 'Six Feet Under' and was very sad when it ended, so I was not ready to switch my a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, feet, blood pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e feet.

frase_original: I was a fan of 'Six Feet Under' and was very sad when it ended, so I was not ready to switch my allegiance to another show. So I was like, 'I'm not watching this 'True Blood.' Then a friend got a bootleg copy of the first four episodes, and by the third one, I was irrevocably hooked.
